app:docker:migrate: docker compose exec app php artisan migrate --force --no-interaction
app:docker:seed: docker compose exec app php artisan db:seed --force --no-interaction
app:docker:seed:content: docker compose exec app php artisan db:seed --class="Database\Seeders\StorefrontSiteContentSeeder" --force --no-interaction
app:docker:refresh: docker compose exec app php artisan migrate:fresh --seed --force --no-interaction
